reviews.review_description:
VR Commando: Arcade Shooter is a fun and energetic arcade shooter that instantly brings back memories of classics like Ikari Warriors on the Amstrad CPC. That old-school run-and-gun spirit translates nicely into VR, giving the game a nostalgic yet modern feel.

The core gameplay mechanics are enjoyable, with fast-paced action that keeps you moving and reacting. While the game is still in Early Access and there’s room for refinement and polish, the foundations are clearly there.

Visually, the game is colorful and vibrant, with assets that go beyond simple low-poly designs, helping the environments feel lively and engaging. The overall presentation supports the arcade vibe well and makes the experience easy to jump into for short, fun sessions.

With continued updates and improvements, VR Commando has the potential to become a solid retro-inspired arcade shooter that fans of classic action games and VR alike will enjoy.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the detailed and thoughtful review. We are glad you enjoyed the fast-paced arcade action and the nostalgic run-and-gun experience inspired by classic shooters. It is great to hear that the visuals, vibrant environments, and overall presentation enhanced the arcade feel and made the game easy to jump into.

We appreciate your feedback and support, and we look forward to delivering continued improvements to make the experience even more enjoyable.

reviews.review_description: Delete n refund right away. Can't believe I fell for this

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about your experience. We never intend to mislead users. If this was related to a misunderstanding or accidental purchase, Meta provides a refund option. If the issue is resolved, we would appreciate it if you could consider updating your review. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: A simple and effective port of a classic
reviews.review_description:
A simple and effective port of a classic mobile game.
Enjoy playing on a larger scale with gameplay designed for VR. Ideal for short sessions.
